title: Minecraft Dungeons Weaponry
description: Adds the weapons from minecraft dungeons to regular minecraft!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7100a49efba8a4246be4a8d20909331f8851091.jpeg)

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

![weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/385c07ebd9a264893f9a3dc629a380a3dc2765db.jpeg)

![Enchantments](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c69f92ef591751265fdf8b620771e90ce8e0d60.jpeg)

![Chests](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c397a418e916bba36f80de9afa382c9248beccb9.jpeg)

![Bundles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9581607c96884b38f7907a5b2f1ef9fa9332d522.jpeg)

![Structure Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0881200ea7450257cfa5fd92d2d95b6ebafeb45a.jpeg)

![Boss Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b234b426da632132967b068653057488f209f61c.jpeg)

</details>

</details>


<details>
<summary>Enchantments</summary>

This mod adds over 20 enchantments. Here's a summary of what they all do.

<---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------->

Shared pain -
When a mob is attacked, it damages nearby mobs, dependant on the damage of the user's weapon.

Prospecter -

When hitting a mob, they have a chance of dropping emeralds.

Dynamo -

After rolling 3 times whilst holding the weapon, the player can deal a hit dealing a large amount of damage. Getting hit lowers a level of dynamo.

Leeching -

WHen killing a mob, heals the player the maximum amount of health of the mob (based off enchantment level).

Freezing -

When hitting a mob, freezes them for a short amount of time. Freeze time stacks.

Chorus -

When hitting amob whilst sneaking, they will teleport away from you.

Stunning -

When hitting a mob, they can be stunned for a short period of time. This has a cooldown.

Saturating -

When killing a mob, fills the players hunger and saturation.

Ambush -

When attacking a mob that isn't attacking you, deal a high amount of damage. (Doesn't affect players.)

Exploding -

When a mob is killed, they explode. This damages the player too.

Comitted -

When hitting the mob, the damage you deal increases dependant on how much damage you've dealt.

Pushback -

Stronger knockback.

Illager's Bane -

Deals more damage to illagers.

Rampaging -

When killing a mob, gain a temporary speed and damage boost.

Weakening -

Weakens the target.

Dual weilding -

When holding a dual weild weapon in your main hand and off hand, it hits the target with both hands.

Levitating -

Levitates the target.

Swirling -

After hitting the target, damages nearby mobs. This also damages the user.

Poison cloud -

Poisons nearby entities.

Withering - 

Gives the target the wither effect.

Gust -

Shoots the target into the air.

Gravity -

WHen hitting a mob, it pulls them towards the user.

Thundering - 

Strikes thunder when attacking.

Chains -

Chains a mob, causing them to be unable to move or take knockback.

Radiance -

Regenerates the user.

Critical hit -

Causes the target to take extra damage. The cooldown is target sided.

Rushdown -

When killing a mob, gain a temporary speed and swimming boost.

Voidstrike -

In a 5-hit combo, you deal more damage. Once the combo reaches an end you're damage will be set back to its original.

Crimson Bliss -

When killing a mob, completely heals the user.

Echo -

Repeats the attack.~~~~

Pogo -

When crouching and attacking, the player is shot backwards and damages nearby mobs.~~~~

Agility -

Shortens the rolling cooldown.

Crushing -

Acts as a mace.

Home Run -

When right-clicking, blast nearby mobs into the air.

Ringing -

Every few seconds the target rings, making them glow.

Rein of the Abyss -

Deals damage through armour.

Phantom Form -

When killing a mob become invisible, gaining a speed boost and low gravity.

Bone Pick -

All enemies nearby will attack the target.

Echo Expel -

When right-clicking nearby mobs are shot outwards.

</details>


<details>
<summary>The Deathbringers</summary>

![deathbringers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/781a56528c917ad3196c7ae8132233420a2723ba.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Traits</summary>

![Traits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd43cfc8ad3ddb990da7b863b8f21f6f84822849.png)

The new traits can be obtained by trading with the loot goblin. If the player isn't wearing a delightful perfume, the goblin is hostile and will attack the player before running away.
The GUI gives more information about the traits and their recipes.

</details>

![World Level]

Now, every 15 days the world level will increase. This gives an increase to mobs damage, health and armor. However, levels can be skipped. If you kill the ender dragon the world level will be advanced to 3. Killing the wither skips it to level 5.

</details>
